case_title: ELARMS LUTHER VS PARK JAMES BAY DOOR INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY ELARMS LUTHER AS TO DEFENDANT PARK JAMES    BAY DOOR INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO JAMES PARK RECEIVED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELARMS LUTHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARK JAMES    BAY DOOR INC. $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $512.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $35.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT PARK JAMES    BAY DOOR INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PARK JAMES    BAY DOOR INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $701.29 AS TO DEFENDANT PARK JAMES    BAY DOOR INC.
